name: @anvil/agent-core
description: Shared LLM stack — unified LanguageModel interface, provider adapters, agent subprocess machinery, and cost calculation for cli + knowledge-core + headless runners.

scripts.build: tsc -b && mkdir -p dist/data && cp src/data/model-prices.json dist/data/
scripts.test: tsc -b && mkdir -p dist/data && cp src/data/model-prices.json dist/data/ && node --test dist/__tests__/*.test.js dist/agent/session/__tests__/*.test.js
